hypothesis: If aromatic bond valency is correctly calculated as 1.5 rather than rounded to 1, and molecular geometry is evaluated using quantum mechanical methods (GFN2-xTB) rather than classical force fields (MMFF94), then current 3D molecule generation models will show substantially different validity rates and geometric quality assessments, revealing that previously reported benchmarks systematically overestimate chemical validity and underestimate geometric errors due to compounding methodological inaccuracies.
